scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/server/index.html dist/server/index.html && cp src/server/kanban.html dist/server/kanban.html && chmod +x dist/cli/cli.js && node scripts/inject-version.js && rm -rf dist/www && cp -r www dist/www
scripts.//: Tests are intentionally parallel-safe: they use isolated HOME/TAMANDUA_STATE_DIR temp dirs per test, reserveRandomPort() for port allocation, and avoid shared fixed ports (3334/3338/3339) except where explicitly testing production defaults. Real CLI defaults remain 3334 (dashboard), 3338 (MCP), 3339 (control plane).
